description_long: This object consists of two basketball hoop assemblies positioned opposite each other, suggesting a full basketball court layout. Each assembly features a rectangular backboard, one side with a transparent glass-like appearance and the other with a solid orange color, mounted on a sturdy metal pole with a black base. The hoops are affixed to the backboards and include visible rims and nets. The bases appear weighted and robust, suitable for outdoor or urban environments. No court surface or painted markings are visible, and there is no fencing or enclosure around the area. The design is minimal, focusing on the essential elements required for a basketball game.
description: A pair of opposing basketball hoop assemblies with rectangular backboards and sturdy bases, suitable for outdoor urban play. No court markings or enclosure are present.
description_view_0: Two basketball hoops with rectangular backboards are seen from an angled perspective, showing both the transparent and solid orange sides.
description_view_1: A direct front and back view of the hoops, highlighting the transparent glass backboard on one and the solid orange backboard on the other.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, both hoops are visible from an opposite angle, again showing the contrasting backboard faces.
description_view_3: A repeat of the direct front and back view, emphasizing the difference between the glass and orange backboards.
